ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL(Functional_Status__c, "Open"), NOT(ISBLANK(Functional_User__c)), TEXT(Remarks_by_RM__c) == "Closed Satisfactory", ISCHANGED(Remarks_by_RM__c) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: When the Functional Status is Open and a Functional User is assigned, the Remarks by RM can not be set to 'Closed Satisfactory'.
